queries.question: Give me the description of the game that is common to all casinos.
queries.sql: SELECT Games.description  from Casinos_Games join Games on Casinos_Games.game_id = Games.id join Casinos on Casinos_Games.casino_id = Casinos.id   GROUP BY Casinos_Games.game_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Casinos_Games.casino_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Casinos)

queries.question: Give me the games that are popular in all casinos.
queries.sql: SELECT Games.game_name  from Casinos_Games join Games on Casinos_Games.game_id = Games.id join Casinos on Casinos_Games.casino_id = Casinos.id   GROUP BY Casinos_Games.game_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Casinos_Games.casino_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Casinos)

queries.question: Show me the names of the games along with their descriptions that are offered by every casino.
queries.sql: SELECT Games.game_name, Games.description  from Casinos_Games join Games on Casinos_Games.game_id = Games.id join Casinos on Casinos_Games.casino_id = Casinos.id   GROUP BY Casinos_Games.game_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Casinos_Games.casino_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Casinos)

queries.question: Show me the names of the games along with their descriptions that are offered by every casino.
queries.sql: select casinos.name , games.game_name , games.description from Casinos_Games join Games on Casinos_Games.game_id = Games.id join Casinos on Casinos_Games.casino_id = Casinos.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?game_name ?description WHERE {
  ?casinos_games a :Casinos_Games .
  ?games a :Games .
  ?casinos_games p:hasGames ?games .
  ?casinos a :Casinos .
  ?casinos_games p:hasCasinos ?casinos .
  ?casinos p:name ?name .
  ?games p:game_name ?game_name .
  ?games p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: For each casino, show me the corresponding game description.
queries.sql: select casinos.name , games.description from Casinos_Games join Games on Casinos_Games.game_id = Games.id join Casinos on Casinos_Games.casino_id = Casinos.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {

  ?games a :Games .

  ?casinos a :Casinos .
  ?casinos_games p:hasCasinos ?casinos .
  ?casinos p:name ?name .
  ?games p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: What game does each casino have?
queries.sql: select casinos.name , games.game_name from Casinos_Games join Games on Casinos_Games.game_id = Games.id join Casinos on Casinos_Games.casino_id = Casinos.id
queries.sparql:

  ?casinos a :Casinos .
  ?casinos_games p:hasCasinos ?casinos .

What game does each casino have?
